name: @devpartner/workers
description: Worker management for Copilot CLI - spawn, monitor, and cleanup isolated worker processes

scripts.build: ncc build src/skill-cli.ts -o scripts --minify --no-source-map-register && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const walk=(d)=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=d+'/'+e.name;if(e.isDirectory()){walk(p);if(fs.readdirSync(p).length===0)fs.rmdirSync(p);}else if(p.endsWith('.d.ts')||p.endsWith('.d.ts.map')){fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});}}};if(fs.existsSync('scripts'))walk('scripts');"
